---
title: "ELE649"
description: "Notes and materials for ELE649."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, reading-time]
---

Every page in this folder appears below automatically, newest first. To add a
new one, create a new `.qmd` file in this folder with a title, description,
and date in the front matter. It will show up here the next time the site is
rendered.
